title: Rich Arabian Lentils Skillet
description: Umami-packed, crumbly lentil skillet with ginger cordial and wok-hei flavor, nostalgic Saudi Arabian comfort in a cast-iron pan.
instructions: Preheat cast-iron skillet over medium heat and add olive oil.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and ginger, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Sprinkle cumin, coriander, and cinnamon, sautéing for 30 seconds to toast spices.
Pour in rinsed red lentils and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Add vegetable broth and ginger cordial, bring to a simmer and cover.
Reduce heat to low and let the lentils cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Once lentils are tender, stir in fresh lemon juice and season with salt and pepper.
Remove from heat and allow the skillet to rest for 5 minutes to thicken the sauce.
Serve hot straight from the skillet, garnished with a sprinkle of chopped cilantro if desired.
